stem: In a class of 50 students, 15 students received an A on the final exam. What percent of the class received an A?

distractorRationale.A: Student used the count (15) directly as the percentage without dividing by the total.
distractorRationale.C: Student added 15 and 50 to get 65 and subtracted 30: 65 − 30 = 35% — or student computed 50 − 15 = 35 and reported that as the percentage.
distractorRationale.D: Student divided 15 by 50 but forgot to multiply by 100: 15/50 = 0.30, misread as 3%.
